title: National Theatre Live: A Streetcar Named Desire
original_title: National Theatre Live: A Streetcar Named Desire
overview: As Blanche’s fragile world crumbles, she turns to her sister Stella for solace – but her downward spiral brings her face to face with the brutal, unforgiving Stanley Kowalski.
